description: Vetted small local models the engine can download and run at tier zero (no server installed). llm → llama.cpp (llama-server, OpenAI-compat chat); stt → whisper.cpp (whisper-server). Sizes are approximate; never auto-downloaded — a starter model is fetched only on an explicit click.

models.name: Qwen2.5 1.5B Instruct (Q4_K_M)
models.description: Small, fast, warms quickly — the first-run default. Apache-2.0, ungated.

models.name: Qwen2.5 3B Instruct (Q4_K_M)
models.description: A step up in quality for a little more memory. Apache-2.0, ungated.

models.name: Whisper base.en
models.description: Tiny English transcription model — the tier-zero audio path.

models.name: Whisper small.en
models.description: More accurate English transcription for a larger download.
